findings.description: The image contains two intermediate bullet points explaining the two actions performed by the call line ('引数に3と2を渡して関数sumを呼び出す' and '関数sumの実行結果を整数型の変数resultに代入する'). These are part of the body prose and are captured in term::1's definition, so no independent entity is missing. Noted for completeness only.

reviewer_notes: Five entities cleanly cover the page: return-value program example with ①②③ annotations, the sum-call explanation, output '5', function-advantages paragraph, and 手続 sidebar. term::4 kana_helper 'てつづき' matches the furigana in the image. All jp surfaces and zh/en translations are accurate. The page begins mid-sentence (continuation from p.364) which is correctly handled by starting with the program figure rather than an artificial intro.
